FLENTROY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 1ST CUSTOM DIGITAL HEARING AID CENTER IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DETERMINES THAT THE CERTIFED MAIL RERTURN FOR THE PROOF OF SERVICE IS NOT VALID. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 1ST CUSTOM DIGITAL HEARING AID CENTER $7,580.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,580.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
